name: Influencer identification
prompt: Find the right influencer profile for a B2B project management tool targeting engineering managers on YouTube.

name: Outreach message
prompt: Write an influencer outreach message for a no-code automation tool to send to a LinkedIn creator with 25K followers in the ops space.

name: Campaign brief
prompt: Write a full campaign brief for a YouTube integration video for our API monitoring tool.

name: ROI measurement
prompt: How should I measure the ROI of our micro-influencer campaign that just ran?
